reviews.comment: All 10 invariants hold; 20/20 checklist items pass; tsc/lint/build green; INVARIANT 5 drift is non-blocking (matches logs/network precedent, will be migrated under N11). Manual browser verification pending — recommend handoff to /task-human-review.

Console panel mounts but captures zero entries despite active DevTools console traffic ([Auth], [API], Vite logs). Patch likely not surviving StrictMode/effect-thrash cycles. Recommended fix: make patchConsole persistent (no restore in useEffect cleanup), subscribe with mount-once effect, propagate maxEntries via store mutation. See REVIEW.md Round 2 for diagnostic steps and full fix path.

fix.comment: Blocker 1 fixed: made patchConsole persistent (no restore in cleanup), subscriber effect now mount-once with updateDataRef, added defensive Object.defineProperty fallback, added _callCount diagnostic. tsc + lint + build + prettier all green.

reviews.comment: Round 2 fix verified working (wrapper installed, JS-initiated console.log captured). Remaining gap: pre-mount messages and browser-emitted entries are not in panel. Human accepted INVARIANT 3 trade-off and chose to fold early-capture into N14: move patchConsole to module-load top-level. Categories (2)/(3) remain architecturally unreachable.

fix.comment: Round 3 fix: Option B opt-in. Added installConsoleCapture() and installNetworkErrorCapture() exported from src/index.ts. Panel no longer eagerly patches — consumers must call install functions before createRoot. installNetworkErrorCapture wraps fetch and surfaces failures via console.error so the consoleLogger panel captures them. Dev preview opts in. All gates pass.

reviews.comment: Round 4: panel UI shows full Error stack trace, but Copy Snapshot serializes Error args to {} because Error properties are non-enumerable. Fix: serialize Error instances to { __error: true, name, message, stack } shape in pushEntry, format the same way in panel's formatArg. Narrow, no public-API change.

fix.comment: Round 4 fix: Error instances now serialize to { __error: true, name, message, stack } in pushEntry. formatArg detects the shape and renders the stack trace same as before. Panel UI unchanged; snapshot JSON now contains full error text instead of {}. SerializedError type re-exported per INVARIANT 6.

reviews.comment: Round 5 AI re-review: APPROVED. Round-4 Error serialization fix verified at consoleLoggerStore.ts:71-90 and ConsoleLoggerPanel.tsx:20-36. All gates green. Invariants 1,2,4,6,7,8,9,10 hold; INVARIANT 3 intentionally relaxed (Round-3 decision); INVARIANT 5 pre-existing precedent. Ready for final human verification + merge.
